title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.485 - Constitutional charter cities subject to the provisions of sections 137.485 to 137.550
text:
137.485.  Constitutional charter cities subject to the provisions of sections 137.485 to 137.550. — Any constitutional charter cities in this state not situated within a county shall be subject to the provisions of sections 137.485 to 137.550 with respect to the assessment of real and tangible personal property for state, school and local purposes.
(L. 1945 p. 1859 § 1)
